definition:
1. fit for business, active, business-like;  οἱ πραγματικοί men of action , (Polybius Historicus) 
2. in Roman writers, pragmaticus  was a kind of attorney , [Refs 1st c.BCCicero, M. Tullius 
3. of history, systematic , (Polybius Historicus): of a speech, conduct, etc., able, prudent , (Polybius Historicus):—;adverb -κῶς, (Polybius Historicus) (ML)
